name: FN57 | 三位一体
descriptionEn: Highly accurate and armor-piercing, the pricy Five-Seven is a slow-loader that compensates with a generous 20-round magazine and forgiving recoil. It has been given a light blue DDPAT hydrographic as well as a custom painted slide. I don't profit from war, I profit from the human condition... - Booth, Arms Dealer
descriptionZh: 拥有极高的精准度，能穿透护甲，价格昂贵的 FN57 换弹时间较慢，作为补偿，它具有设计巧妙的 20 发子弹和较低的后坐力。 这把武器采用了浅蓝色数字迷彩（DDPAT）水转印工艺，滑套部位则额外进行了定制喷涂。 我不从战争中获利，我从人的境况中获利... - 军火商布兹
